notes.issue: The canonical metric evidence refs include broad customer-satisfaction context blocks. During writer review, the precise S78 wait-time values were found in 2014_hylan_blvd_final_report#p018_c0010, while the S78 travel-time values were found in 2014_hylan_blvd_final_report#p019_c0003. The writer page cites the precise blocks where possible; a future semantic correction should tighten the metric evidence refs through the normal correction path rather than hand-editing canonical JSONL.

The fare-free pilot map text in meeting_doc_147096 appears to misplace S46/S96 under a Queens/Jamaica label. The writer page used fare_free_bus_pilot_evaluation#p002_c0006 for Staten Island placement instead.
